description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black metal pole rising from a rectangular stone or concrete base. At the top, a single ornate lantern-style lamp head is encased in a glass housing with a decorative finial at its peak. The lamp head is supported by a short, flared neck and is adorned with subtle ornamental details, giving it a classic Victorian or Edwardian appearance. The base is robust and textured, likely designed to anchor the post securely in urban environments such as sidewalks or parks. The overall design is both functional and decorative, blending utilitarian lighting with period-inspired aesthetics. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are visible on the structure.
description: A tall, black, classic-style lamppost with an ornate lantern head and a sturdy rectangular base, featuring subtle decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate lantern head, and rectangular base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, revealing the same features with minimal change in visible details.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the lantern head and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the same structure and details as other views.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian-style lantern with glass panels and a decorative finial
